transcript.text:
Tzuyang, enjoy your meal
[This video was taken in compliance with COVID-19 prevention regulations & guidelines before the opening of Everland business hours]
[I'm so hungry because I woke up early to come here]
[Thankfully I brought some food]
[I'll eat it on the roller coaster to save some time]
[It was nice to meet you Mr. T-Tanam]
[This is a piece of cake]
[Not even nervous]
Stop stop stop [Let's go!]
Help me!
[I didn't pass out]
[This must be one of those bad dreams]
Mom! [Parents' Day: May 8th]
[It's already over]
Did you eat it?
Very good job [I cry too sometimes]
Are you crying? [I just can't help it sometimes]
